sheets.name: Andrew I wonder how men
rows:
Some people are just happy with one. The guy who gets his dream car (girl) will cherish it with everything he has. He will polish it and make sure everything is perfect all the time. 
The rich (spoiled) guy that has multiple (whatever) has to divide his attention between them all. Not one is special to him. He doesn’t have the time to focus on one because he has so many. 
When you can’t full devote all your undivided attention something’s will definitely fall through the cracks.

I know what you’re saying but cars are not people with their own personality and so on. 

If women didn’t have that it would be lame.

If you can figure out how to be openly with more than one, it’s possible and much more fulfilling than just buying another thing.
True love isn’t about variety, it’s about loyalty. A man who truly loves invests in one heart… that’s passion, not brokenness 💯

Comparing women to cars is already where the logic falls apart. Love isn’t about collecting options, it’s about choosing one person fully. Some men aren’t “restricted", they’re intentional. Depth over variety.

Brokenness? Sickness? Nah. Some men just have options and the capacity to handle them. If you love cars, you don’t park one in the garage for life and act like the showroom doesn’t exist. You appreciate variety, performance, different drives. The problem isn’t wanting more it’s lying about it. If you’re built for one, cool. If you’re built for a fleet, own it.
You're just casually comparing women with cars. The hate is deep rooted.
If you really think having several women makes you a man, you already lost. As a man, have something going on in your life other than just focusing on women...

In order for men to be able to reach that kind of level where he has access to many women, he has to be on the 1% and which majority are not there yet.
Status is which makes men attract all kinds of women.
Men need to have status first in order for them to get to the next level.
For satisfaction and internal ,only one loveable girl is enough because our soul except only one as his mate other are extra rush in mind

Some men have other things to think about other than their dicks. Some men just value themselves enough to know that they can also love themselves more than cars. Some men just value themselves like that.
Mens becareful of whom you sleep with ! Sex is spiritual. It can make you or break you! So as much as @kibeandy is your king of advice..this one ☝️ today i disagree with.
That mindset of yours is expensive, man. Do not ever lose your focus because of some few inches of body part, I mean we have other great body parts too like the brain, the nose and Many others

capitalism dicapasitated our cognition and abandoned our nation-ship (Culture), hashish, traditionally monogamy was seen as deficiency and polygamy was wealth. you are right on the brokeness part, sickness maybe the christians
Discipline bois, learn to be disciplined. Get your 4 women and settle.
Treating hearts like a car collection is a bold strategy, but most men just can't afford the "maintenance" costs of multiple models. One engine is usually enough to keep life running!

What a man thinken is what he becomes,real mean are out here chasing real dreams not entertaining how many women he should have or cars, because his all efforts is on how to produce solutions to daily life challenges 💯💪

It's called self respect, some  men don't want their bodies to be seen by everyone, mind you once a woman sleeps with a man the respect is thrown away, instead of saying Mr so,she will call by your first name

Women are human beings with feelings, not cars to be owned by men.Gosh, women need to normalise hating men!Women you are better off alone with your cats than with stupid men like this!Tujipende please!

In nature's software a man was given the power to impregnate at infinity(poly)...I mean he can impregnate at any point but 
Women conceive a seed at a time(mono)
She's dating you because she needs your help, not your 💕
People aren’t cars. Some men value depth over variety. Loyalty isn’t brokenness; it’s a choice.
Everything is spiritual. Some men jaut dont want to deal with the many spirits from different women.

You're misleading men into having an abundance mindset, 

You're a bad guy men.
Cars are more important than women anyday and everyday, women like you should be compared to the lowest comparison of the grid
Women should be compared to cows nevertheless
Car-enthusiast actually love  vintage cars .As for Surwali-thusiasts like you, it's a story for another day

Exclusive partnership,availability and reciprocity is common in such setups.

I endorse them 💯
People like kibe are damaged beyond repair. So they're coming to influence weak minds here. Misery loves company.
You are either a woman or feminine
It's not comparing women to cars it's completely women to some expensive shiet?

"spiritual"is a myth otherwise have slept with many ,,,, probably with Good or bad spirits but my life is progressing on well🫴.....( You are very religious that's why I believe that)......in the past African men where polygamous until colonisation 🫴

By pooling emotional and financial capital with one high-value woman, a man creates a "Synergistic Compound" that accelerates wealth creation. 
A car is a tool you drive; a wife is a partner you build with.
Health wise broh, it is not about sleeping around with everyone; apart from HIV there is herpes. It is not about anything else, but the market is dirty.
Men who follow Kifee are lambistic and puny just like him

Yeah until your fun days are over, age reduces your movement to atound house and you're not fun 😒 anymore. 
You be sitting alone and hating the living coz you be dead waiting for your death day. Angel of death is patient with this type. It is fucked up if you are broke.
This has nothing to do with love
So you can have a favourite parent, child, cousin, auntie, uncle, niece & nephew but cars and women is where you draw the line ...you must have 1 to cherish it...I wanda 🚮

Monogamy is often just a fancy word for "lack of options."

If you have the drive to own the fleet, the estate, and the empire, why would you stop at the shoreline of your personal life?

Top G’s don’t settle for "just one" of anything. G’s lead circles not lines.
Women are not cars so your line of reasoning is already questionable. But Anto Daher wants three.
We exist. Those with only one Woman.

Agreed. Even the men in the Bible had one mission, to serve their higher purpose. Abraham, Issac, Jacob had 3+ wives. That's how they multiplied faster. Modern man is serving a woman, giving power to the wrong purpose. I'l be marrying 3 wives , several hot side chicks too
Women are not cars. Thats the easiest way to end up broke, dead or in deep s@*t.

When you realize women be  headache,  you go stick to even none.  😂 
Oxymoron.
Women are not cars you dumb toad!

Because cars don't grow on trees Kibe

Each woman comes with a bill

One man lost, we are down one man, less one.
The statement is psychologically crippled
Man, the only thing you usually think about is sleeping with women 😂 🫴 there is nothing else,
Kibe his right ….u can’t protect something thats it’s not yours .many men in Kenya does not love themselves. Wake up ur not his father

U just need one good woman in ur life ,and u will see the Greatness of that love  . I personally think that a man who finds satisfaction in one woman is greater than a man who finds love in several . No offence ima big fan

You are the one who is sick.
What do multiple women add a man?
Reasons why a Woman cannot be compared to material things like a car..?

Things I want to hear in men's circles. 

A man should keep several women. 

And every week you are on a business trip.

My grandfather had multiple wives 😂
There is sense in your statement Kifee...every living thing male tend to accommodate multiple wives so you are right 👍
Cars don't have STIs and some funny spiritual baggage.

Men are not motorcycles with one headlamp.

Diversify, seduce fuck more women.
I said this and the man raising a child who is not his insulted me badly
Love for women has led many men to graves and poverty.
You are indeed an idiot it's not a joke anymore. This is not even for traction. You are just thick!

Could you show us that ONE woman you have LOVED? or TWO? 
There is a huge difference between loving a woman  and having sex with a woman
@grok how successful are monogamous marriages compared to polygamous ones?
Same way am satisfied being Kenyan I will still be satisfied  being a one woman man. Real  Men other important things to do other than running from one Bermuda triangle to another.

Studies in shared cultures show monogamous marriages tend to be more stable: lower divorce rates overall, with polygynous ones (esp. 3+ wives) up to 5x higher. Women in polygamous setups face 2.25x higher depression odds and worse family functioning/satisfaction per 2021 meta-analysis. Husbands often report higher satisfaction with extra wives. Recent data finds no clear child outcome edge for monogamy, sometimes polygyny aids resilience in tough conditions. Success hinges on culture and people.

Most women are unimpressive compared to men but when two people who have worked on themselves come together they have no choice but to be consumed in one another.
It’s not just men that ‘settle’ your Russian egonga alipita na married women because they settled.
And that's the reason you are still roaming in the city as a single man without responsibility of being Aman in your own home at 58?

They are not

🌹 Majority are CONDITIONED by religion and PROGRAMMED by society

🌹 Some lack the financial capacity & Status 

🌹 Men PRETEND most to enjoy Marriage

Lastly, majority of us MEN

Are TOLERANCE as SIZE of our Pocket & LEVEL of our accomplishment
makosaa unafanya is putting women and cars on the same sentence
I like those men who know what true love is; they are talking with dignity
When my brokenness is cured, this sickness will disappear instantly. I pile them on a tray like eggs. Gaddamit.

sheets.name: Rixpoet My voice was beaten
rows: Your uncle was a police man and he watched you being abused the way you did ? That’s sick
Man this story just stired some emotions in me.i feel like you just told my whole story.
This is a refreshing interview. Happy to see men stepping out of toxic societal norms and becoming emotionally healthy 👏🏾
This is a great story, what we do to our children shapes their future indeed...

So so sad that a whole grown man unleashes his idiocy on a wife and kids
 Am disappointed! Thank you for sharing about effects of childhood traumas. Your dad is a perfect example of a Narcissist and thanks for learning to handle your situation.

Thanks for sharing my husband was abusive but later on I tried to check on his background I found out that was what his  father used to to be violent and abusive. The pattern was repeating itself
For real men are struggling from their past and they can't find way out of the situation though the solution is reprograme our mind so that we can be free from the trauma
You have put it so well. We need to feel safe around people so that we don’t continue to replicate the pains we hold on other people. That’s the only way to stop the vicious cycle. Thank you
To imagine that there were grown ups  in this house who could no protect this child from an irrational psycopath parent. Including the Mom... So heart rending.
I feel like this is what exactly was happening to my brother according to behavior resembles

Im soo happy for your mum getting out of her abusive relationship. I wish for your sake that she did it much earlier...... I don't know what the government is like if a woman leaves her husband, whether she can get help. You mentioned she was a teacher as well so she could have managed financially, I'm thinking.....

That's my childhood, I never miss them,mum and dad,,they weren't there physically, were never supportive,,my dad was way worse,he made me believe I wasn't capable,was not even enough for anything or anyone,,and here I am having done a teaching course and even though something tells me I can stand in a classroom and teach,,some other voice puts me off that I can't really deliver in a class,,and since 2014 after graduating I haven't even gained the confidence to search for a teaching job,,I try to convince myself everyday that am okey,am normal like any other person and can do anything,,, but there is that other side of me that was instilled by my ungrateful father,,but I don't let it drive me,,I try everyday to think positive about myself and after I get some money am planning to at least try counseling,, may God be our strength, Amen

I find it interesting that he has accepted every little indignity meted upon him with a certain quiet contemplation,like a lesson that should be learnt.....free from emotion yet still able to convey his feeling on all the things that happened to him and move on with life.

I went through childhood trauma as well physical, emotional and spiritual abuse. It affected my education too. I remember how on my birthdays i would go cry and my mum’s grave. My parents got married very young as well. As am listening to your story i realise your dad was a narrcisist, in the Bible i believe this is the Jezebel spirit and such people are not epathetic and not able to connect with emotions of others and many other wild characteristics they are actually very broken people inside but are not self reflective am glad you healed as i did and am also helping others as well. I have been listening to Lisa Romano a life coach she has great healing tips and finding self again. Am glad I have found God and found myself as well.I have been on the healing path for 15years now and am glad am free!! Thank you Erick for sharing your story!
i went through the same at the hands of my mom,am slowly healing from depression as a result, happy for you that you came through this

Went through the same thing with my mother and father, but mother was more abusive. All the frustrations and bad things happening to the family were my fault as the eldest. Her abuse was physical, mental and emotional and covert at the same time. No one outside should know. I think she knew she was abusing us because she used to say that no one should speak about what happens at home and that family secrets should be kept within the family. Refused friends or any other person being close to us. Now i look back and think she didn’t want anyone finding out how she made our lives hell at home when no one was watching. I think she went through the same abuse and she didn’t know better. Generational curses are real, i walked away and promised to do better. It messes people up. But am glad i left far away from that abuse.
Your mum has also been through a lot caught up in the abuse cycle and no lifeline or anyone to help her get out...
My dad never hit me, but my mother my scars tell it all. RIP daddy. I will forever be grateful for the life we shared 🥰

You see men walking around looking normal, yet you don't know what scars they bear. Then they get married to a girl from a normal family and it just goes downhill coz they haven't dealt with their demons. I'm sorry this happened to you and glad you are healing.

feeling so torn. So mum and uncle were watching while papa was beating the boy naked then tie his hands and burn him with parafin.? i cnt even start to imagine how it felt for mum bedding such a monster

Have been a victim of trauma too. Really appreciate this talk. It is only when I started working in a mental health organization that I realized I had been struggling with depression. It affected my academics, was questioning my existence too. To a point a had suicidal ideations. To this day I struggle with relationships especially my mum, all the trauma has been caused by her.
Mine is psychological trauma, I can relate with your story.
Why are the women commenting , men come out and  speak of it !!!!!!!! Lets stop it please stop it  we are losing smart, intelligent men !! PTSD is real  . I am praying for all the men in my country
Listening to him is healing in itself.sometimes you are abused but don't even know it because it's a norm in our culture.

JUSTUS, WAOW YOUR STORY IS VERY MOVING, YOU'VE GONE THROUGH A LOT. I WENT THRU SIMILAR CHILDHOOD VERY HARD TO EXPRESS THIS WHEN SOMEONE WHO NEVER EXPERIENCE THIS KIND OF LIFE.  I WANTED TO WRITE BUT BCOS OF MY OTHER SIBLINGS I HELD BACK. BUT THIS EMOTIONAL IMPART IS VERY STRONG, IN FACT MENTALLY AFFECTS YOU.  PEOPLE ARE GOING THRU A LOT. WELDONE FOR BUILDING UP A SETTING TO HELP PEOPLE.  MY SISTER AND I ALWAYS WANTED TO SET UP A CHARITY TO SUPPORT PEOPLE.  DON'T GIVE UP KEEP ENCOURAGING AND YOU MIGHT FIND PEOPLE TO HELP WITH INNER PEACE.  YOU'VE DONE GOOD!

Wow we have the same story though mine was different I was treated sooo bad by my mum and her family no one loved me coz I was a bastard, I escaped many rapes and deaths but God rescued me from my evil family I really suffered as a girl i started dating at age of 15 just to have shelter my story is too long And bitter now I leave in Europe in a quiet place  thank you lord 🙏🏾🙏🏾

I Bless you Brother...
thank You for cmng out because you are motivating others to speak out...I can't even.put mys3lf.in yur feet. that was horrible. I had a crazy Dad but I had a strong mother who protected us  from.his drunk madness.  its sad yur.mom was Weak n helpless. God bless you.

Weldone for taking your power back and curving out your recovery journey. You have been through alot and I empathise with you. It seems God used your pain and translated it into your purpose in helping others find their voice and to start their own recovery journies too.

She should have packed up & left the stupid marriage asap!.Women, protect yourselves , you don't want you + your kids to become a statistic!. As for your dad.........God bless you & your mother for not killing him!.Mom, pick up your fragments & make a collage....
Well I've also been raised by two inconsiderate monsters i neither love nor trust my parents
I understand you every bit! African families can have such baaaaad things happening. From your story, now I know what to do.

Wow this came on time, I actually confronted my mum yesterday abt my childhood trauma she caused,,, she told me she won't apologise because I approached her wrongly,I should've brought it up while we were talking about something else... I am healed at least I got all out of my system which was like chained....

I really use to feel that I was the only one that went though it till I hear you . I am still feeling the pains of  the hands of my dad . As much as he died 24 years ago . It’s because ofGod why am still in this life.

"We were separated from our emotions at a young age."  That is so heart-breakingly true. Otieno we salute you for sharing your story and consciously choosing to be a better person than the blueprint you were given ✊🏾❤

I think you can be so useful in counseling and psychology. You'd change so many lives out here and be a blessing. Maybe you went through all that for a purpose. I relate with you in so many ways. Growing up was not easy. Though in mine there was no physical violence there was too much emotional abuse.

This is what our society needs.Healing.A broken people and family leads to broken societies.
You are  brave to come out and speak of this issues.You went through that for a purpose and this is your ministry.May God continue to use you to help many.

eeh how can someone go through so much! I help domestic violence victims but this child abuse was of another level cheeeee!!!!!Look at the bright side of life. God has had you all this time. All that you went through prepared you for NOW. Now is the time for you to enjoy God's blessings. God has been there all along

Oh Yea! When you've had such an experience, you really learn to appreciate yourself. You learn to make life happen on your own. No connections, No charity, you just stick out your horns and break the Walls for life to move. I had to decide that I WAS NOTHING CLOSE TO WHAT MY DAD HAD LIVED TO DOOM ME TO. I had to frantically go on a search for who I really was. I've seen Therapists for YEARS until my psych stabalized. Until I broke free from The Grip of growing up in an Abusive home. I Frantically searched the Bible for what God thought of me and I decided to run with it like that. PERIOD. That's the only way My life moved. Otherwise I'd still be in such a Dark Hopeless Place.

This Guy, YOU'RE JUST A HERO!

Why did your mum tell you to say yo did it, have you ever questioned whether your mum was supporting your dad? Seems like you were the scapegoat, and would rather let you be the one to experience the wrath of your father as long as it is not her.
To be honest ; lots of our parents were frustrated individuals, some of them  behaved like a sociopaths!!
My brother, pride will cause much pain, so African men have to let pride go. Pride is a demon that has ourcAfrican men in bondage. Nobody can help him; he needs God to help him.

Your story is familiar to my husband's.  Boy, he had a hard life and I got the blunt of his pain, but I've learned to understand his position.  He just does not know how to show love. He only thinks about himself. He's in survival mode. I trust God to help him see that his parents and culture had done him a disservice.

Your father is just like my father, the only difference is he never drunk alcohol,but beatings for real,we had it rough.we had a permanent nyaunyo well kept we were told it's the tail of a hippo,it's a long story

I am glad you realized that cultures can ruin people's lives. Thats why some of those primitive traditions must be obliterated. The younger generation must  stand against them. My brother, please believe that there is hope in God for you. 
Is you talked about the hypocrisy of your father, I realize that some folks are experts of pretense. 
You had said,  because of your painful upbringing, your relationship was not good, but try again. You can love, believe me you can. Ask God to give you his love. Africa is a great place, but some elements of our culture are toxic,  acidic and caustic.

Hallelujah! The best sharing I have watched my entire life. Having had a similar childhood which graduated into intense abusive relationships. Thank you so much Onyango. God Increase you exceedingly. My take home, Church should be everywhere one or two are, from family, friends, neighbors etc. Justus, your presentation of your guests is top notch! God bless you

This is why I am opposed to the people that say children are a blessing. They are a responsibility, they are my responsibility. If I want their life to be a blessing, I need the right skills. I need to understand what they require. Otherwise most children are dealing with childhood trauma, they are perpetuating the cycle of abuse as they don’t know better.

How I wish they taught me such things when I was a child and in school.

Wow. I am glad this man is strong enough to share his story. I am so sorry you have to go through abuse at the hands of your father who is supposed to be your protector and guide. May God heal your heart so you can truly forgive your father.
Leave him. What is the purpose of being with someone who can't love? Men who are unable to love should live alone

Children are a blessing from the Lord.,so even if you oppose it, its the truth. Opposing it is opposing God. Psalms 127:3.Having children comes with responsibility. We are responsible for our children until they become an adult, whether 18 or 21. And they dont owe their parents anything. However, good children will help their children when they are aging.

@oraltraditions6127  they are not a blessing from God they are a product of sex! All those children who will die of hunger today or other preventable causes, do you think God wanted them to die! 

Saying children are a blessing absolves parents from absolute responsibility from bringing children into the earth without planning.

@Imuetinyanosa  children are innocent, it’s the work of parents to ensure children lives are a blessing. Bad parenting =bad adulthood. Too many children are suffering out there, they are too innocent but their lives have been turned into a curse by those who brought them here

@Imuetinyanosa  do you know how many kids we loose in Kenya from preventable causes. Do you know there are children starving to death 💀 in Kenya? We need to all come together and make sure no child dies, how can such suffering come from God? 

Also we need to drum it into people that children are not a miraculous conception they are a responsibility. You need resources and skills

Sorry man! Continue on your healing  journey bro. Those parents need healing too if ONLY they knew how sick  they are,  but it is sad that the people who were to parent you, abused you. Probably your parents were victims too,  and can steal heal in order for the whole family to heal, otherwise the trauma continues.
You are really strong bro! All the best❤
Wooh! I'm so proud of you. I need your courage to speak out. I'm tired of the cycle. I don't know where to begin 😕
Childhood trauma is real and this trauma that may have seemed to happen long time will affect how you in your marriage
You successfully broke the generational cycle of abuse and abundonement.
Wow, I love your authenticity and your healing journey Onyango Otieno. May men arise and speak

There some huge important points that I have never heard from any other movitational speaker.
Thank you.
At first when I started watching your vedio i didn't take it seriously, I am glad that I was chatting with another phone so I didn't interupt the video as time goes i started now picking up nice teachings.
I have learned alot from this video.
I might not have crum everything you've talked about but the little points that I have mastered I am going to share them with some of my friends.
Once again thank you...be blessed.
The very first 2 minutes are already so PROFOUND. WOW! Breaking Generational Curses. Well Done bro. So PROUD of you 👏🏽

Eric you are  a special  man that’s Why you were prepared to come and lead those hurting to heal and change their life into positive , emotional and happy man.Eric keep shining and man “it’s okay to be open to express your feelings “. Be blessed and lots of love🕊 🇰🇪❤️😘😘
Some of those old parents were wicked people with no fear of God. Religious hypocrisy is what they had. May we all heal from childhood traumas

Venting their anger on you could be the only thing uniting them. I also experienced violence, my father always beat me but I came to realize my mother was behind it all. She was inciting him against me. Last year July my father strangled me I was dying. I had to be admitted because I passed out. I eventually left home in November because of verbal abuse and didn't even go back for Christmas. I'm happy where I am, I don't think I'll go back

And yea, Mine was also a Church Guy who behind closed doors was like an absolute LUNATIC!🙆🙆 Honestly I was so confused! Luckily God revealed himself to me personally and I was able to separate between who God really was and what He was not. That kept me from Commiting suicide all the times I contemplated and even attempted. That helped me make it through coz Man! I could never have lived to tell the story.

I'm so proud of men who share their trauma in order to heal themselves as well as other men.  Not enough work is done to help our young men deal with their emotions and mental health.  What happened to him as a child was horrifying.  All too often, children of abuse grow up to be very angry and depressed adults.  Because this man decided to seek out, speak up and get help, he is now we'll adjusted and has a great outlook on life.  Congtats to him on his journey to well-being.
Rix Nyonyango, "They gave me this, I'm giving them this" sure thing, you should choose the kind of man you give the world. Strong!

Every home should be a church. Every home should be a safe space! 
Thank you for sharing your story Eric. 
I will gladly share this.
Justus we are always grateful.
I struggle with depression too and will one day tell my story and be a mental health advocate like you. Thanks for telling your story. Being positive and hopeful always helps.

I am very sorry, my younger sibling. I feel your pain. So sad but yet so inspirational. Thank you for sharing your story, #You have inspired many, me as well.

Then someone just commented that your delusional..?? Unbelievable! I mean, first of all, it has made me so angry that I have flagged and reported her comment as Negative in this community, youtu.be should block him/her...
Negative comments towards an individual's personal story not acceptable, period!!!!
This is powerful. I am raising boys and this has opened helped me to see that I need to stop certain things as it may destroy them. I will definitely do better for my nephew's too. Bless you brother
Sorry brother, may God favor u As a lady not a minute I will allow my husband to overdiscipline my child Normal discipline is enough

I'm affected to date, I pray that GOD will help me out ,I'm fighting and I know I will overcome. Thanks Eric for speaking out for many. Mum and her sister made my life a living hell ,I have never known what motherly love is but anyway I'm old now, I don't need her love anyway. So long as I'm breathing and I'm not sick aaand I can manage my life each day one day at a time, I'm good to go.Buuut I still love her down deep in my heart ,I have forgiven her but going near her is a no .

Violence family and toxic parents can be really tormenting and traumatizing to a child. This story is like mine. I never forget to thank God for my mom to finally gather the courage to leave that marriage. It's been years now ever since we left but the memories of the beatings still hurts me to-date. Kwanza umetaja iyo "nyahunyo" nikaskia mwili  umetetemeka, coz that's what dad used to beat us with 😭😭

This young man went through the most but I am glad he went through a healing journey. These are the authentic stories that am inspired by. I really appreciate men who are bold enough to talk about their challenges and really seek to understand themselves. We need to normalize healing black men, men are not machines they are human beings with emotions hence there should be safe space for them to discuss their issues as well.
I can testify to this after living with a husband who had childhood trauma. Insecurity, paranoia become a big issue in adulthood

They were not wicked. They had no one to explain life issues. They were operating from a point of ignorance completely lost themselves.  We can only forgive them and do a better job with our children. I promised myself not to raise my children the way l was raised.
they are not wicked even parents have traumas in them...remember hurt begets hurt.
They also had their own trauma from their upbringing

God bless the host of this channel, we are learning alot.
Really sorry about the pain you went through, but, you are determined to share and help other people,  thank you...you are a very young man but wise ready to transform the society for the better.
I think we should try to make our society a better and a safer place to be, if one feel that they are struggling mentally, good to ask for help, don't keep quiet.
We can not use the same standards for our parents that we use to guage ourselves

I would actually take it back to our grandparents some of the stories my mum shares you wonder how she did not replicate what was done to her and by extension the colonial machine which introduced this corporal punishment where parents were being beaten infront of their children and women being raped infornt of their husbands for defiance collectively as melananted people we have all endured trauma in some way shape or form others have broken the cycle others continued because they never knew any better you cant do what you have not seen...
Church? No. A home should be just a home; safe, warm, loving, joyous, encouraging... Should be beautiful
Happy for you no child should endure such pain,they never ask to be brought into this world. Hehe and we share names also ruo
Thankful to see that God has kept you Eric. Childhood trauma is extremely difficult but God makes us overcomers. 🌺

The society is soo much concentrated on female empowerment and the male species are left aside....
Its high time we come together and stop toxic masculinity. Since they cant express themselves they become violent or sucidal......Great message big man!! 👏👏
Hi am from Namibia I went through the same thing nice documentary just a bit emotional I excetlly know how that guy feel coz I went through the same  nice one
This man is so true some men are so emotionally divided from their selves thanks for pointing out and making it clare that offen it has been  beaten from them.
@victoreddie9552  oh yes , and I really thank GOD I came across the video, I know its  not an easy road especially when no one understands you and that you are always the bad one .

sheets.name: Eddy Men are evolving
rows: Most of the women you saw are my sister that our Dad took to college and university,I was left out after high school,My dad gives my sister money up now, I was given nothing, Am a boy a. a man,5 years after college,upto now my dad pays my sisters rent.. she have job .I have created my bussines from scratch,she have baby daddy who pays most of her bills.. I have learnt that no one is coming rescue me, Am building my empire now I stay low very low..

Even when I didn't have money I somehow wld find myself inside, I wld sometimes take alcohol from outside then go to club and buy one beer. Couple of years later, I can now afford attending any social space in Nrb, but I have become too choosy, I don't want to spend time in spaces full of strangers who you will never meet again, I have redefined fun. Now I love linking out with friends and overlanding, going camping, Mt climbing, traveling etc Club's are suddenly too loud for me, I care about my safety too, fights in clubs where pple throw bottles and glasses at each other honestly scare me, peace is priceless to me now.

They've now hit their prime with nothing and there is a rush to catch up with the men who sacrificed the night life to build healthy relationships and wealth.Unfortunately, some blame their spouses for the stagnation and mistreat them while some have come to the realisation that they need to EVOLVE and rebuild.It is our hope that they'll thrive and do better.To the men who got it right from the start and accepted their mistakes along the way,keep going.Yes,nothing good comes from sexual immorality, drunkenness, wastage and narcissism.Men must reclaim their honour as God-given and do right by God and society.God help our sons.

sheets.name: EricA woman cant love
rows:
While women fantasize about relationships, men fantasize about greatness. While women fantasize about cuddling, men fantasize about conquering. As men, we want to do something.
We crave significance, influence, and impact

A man's desire for greatness is so strong that he will attempt to experience it through someone else eg A man who shows up with a jersey with the number of a player always considered to be great.

Your greatness should make the lives within your sphere of influence better, not worse. Your greatness ought to inspire other men because they see your impact for good in the lives of others.
@amerix The only love that is unconditional is the love for yourself. The rest, you have to do something to be loved.

@amerix Love is definitely a two-way street. True love thrives on mutual respect, trust, and understanding. 

While it's important for a woman to respect and support her partner, love can't flourish unless it’s reciprocated.

@amerix A woman must obey, submit, and respect her man to be loved.

This view aligns with traditional patriarchal structures but is contested by modern feminist .
@amerix Massive wisdom this one. So, literally modern-day love fraudsters have reversed the order, making it so hard to find love.

@amerix Love is a fallacy. It's women who purport to love men but in reality it's because of what men can provide.
#Changeorperish

@amerix In summery Kings, If a woman disrespects you, she deserves to be abandoned to suffer the pain of her ignorance. 

Very crucial. #BetterTogether
@amerix A what happens to women who find someone younger than them?
@amerix Love is a two way street

@amerix "So, if the woman becomes rude, belligerent, and bellicose, she doesn't deserve to be loved." 

Key points only
@amerix Hapa nayo unatuconfuse,..."but man can't love God"

@amerix I disagree with this 
The Bible say 
You must love  your God with your whole heart and with your whole soul and with your whole mind.”​—MATT. 22:37.

A Man can Love God
@amerix Let me choose someone who loves me so that I can give her respect
@amerix Women love money and money only.. anything else is BS
@amerix So women should not love God? 🤔 We should only submit to human beings? I do not agree to this.

@amerix This is actually on point 100% the only problem is there are a few Men our generation who understands this, they expect a woman to submit to weakness just because you're born male, Men need to upgrade if we are to fix humanity and healthy rshps.

@amerix While I don’t believe in god in the traditional sense, this statement is totally correct, first time I am making such a response amerix content, there is an evolutionary science behind this, but that is a story for another day
@amerix Our lecturer said "Get married to a man who loves you"
@amerix That what can make a good wife
@amerix Man is the prize. Men should stop simping everywhere.
@amerix Obeying commandments and respect to God may as well goes with love The greatest commandment
@amerix Love is a top down action  no wonder it no longer work cause people don't understand it
@amerix It's only women who are allowed to love emotionally
@amerix In matters of love, it is often believed that a man loves a woman, not the other way around. #ManDay
@amerix Women can never love a man. They are only loyal to their feelings. When a man loves them, they know and they are loyal to that treatment they get from the man.

@amerix The hierarchy is clear, it's human who are trying to tamper with it. God wasn't stupid to set the order, those who suffer matter related to love and respect are being punished for disobeying God's order.
@amerix I also believe love is a two way thing if i do love and support then i cannot survive also...has to be mutual for us to grow together
@amerix Literally, this means naeza penda madem wengi as I need?

@amerix The idea that a woman who is "rude, belligerent, and bellicose" doesn't deserve love and should be abandoned reflects a punitive approach to relationships. This view fails to account for the importance of communication, understanding, and growth in relationships.
@amerix On the man's roles, you forgot the most important...he is to be the PRIEST of the home

@amerix So many hurt men in comment section agreeing with this,  truth is Love has to be charged always by, "being loved in return"   i agree with many of your taked but not on this. Who doesnt love their mother? I am toilling right now so that i can build my parents a house. Thats love
@amerix women need to understand this, we didn't make this rules, it's completely natural order, God came first ,man followed, then woman ,then children.
@amerix Then why does the bible say love the Lord your God with all your heart???

A main component of this is that love is an action, not a feeling.

When you love someone you act in a manner that shows that. You do things for them.

Children will appreciate what their Mom does for them. But their Mom is the one who is actively doing things for them.

Love is action. If you love someone, then show them by your actions.
@amerix Respect and love are mutual, not one-sided. Healthy relationships thrive on partnership, not subservience. A loving man and woman support and cherish each other equally.
@amerix Ephesians 5:33*: "However, each one of you also must love his wife as he loves himself, and the wife must respect her husband."

@amerix However, the similarities of these two comparable relationships should not be confused as equivalents, for the love of God to a man is the purest form of love that supersedes that of a man to his wife.
@amerix On the 4Ps so far I've managed penetration. Now let me work on the remaining in order to be a complete man. #Manday

@amerix This is wrong teaching. God is love, and the Bible says while we were yet sinners, He died for us. He doesn't love us because we are worthy or submissive, but because it's His nature to love. His love is unconditional. Even when He chastises and corrects, He does it in love.
@amerix If only men could know what amerix knows,this world could be easy.
@amerix "...Therefore, man must obey, submit, and respect God to be loved..." ..this a weak god.
@amerix Be a man who uses the 4ps not doing what she wants
